EOF
mkdir -p $WORK/b001/exe/
cd .
GOROOT='/usr/lib/go' /usr/lib/go/pkg/tool/linux_amd64/link -o $WORK/b001/exe/a.out -importcfg $WORK/b001/importcfg.link -installsuffix shared -X=runtime.godebugDefault=containermaxprocs=0,cryptocustomrand=1,decoratemappings=0,gotestjsonbuildtext=1,httpcookiemaxnum=0,multipathtcp=0,randseednop=0,rsa1024min=0,tlsmlkem=0,tlssecpmlkem=0,tlssha1=1,updatemaxprocs=0,urlmaxqueryparams=0,urlstrictcolons=0,x509rsacrt=0,x509sha256skid=0,x509usepolicies=0 -buildmode=pie -buildid=KyAslAlwaF0kt1EnOirG/f9Z0vEf2QDUktC-sHl8x/TwZI2sCq1SsZ0BRIsaP_/KyAslAlwaF0kt1EnOirG -w -X github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.Version=28.2.2 -X github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.GitCommit=45873be4ae3f5488c9498b3d9f17deaddaf609f4 -X github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.BuildTime=2026-05-04T01:35:53.000000000+00:00 -X github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.PlatformName= -X github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.ProductName= -X github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.DefaultProductLicense= -extld=x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-gcc $WORK/b001/_pkg_.a
go tool buildid -w $WORK/b001/exe/a.out # internal
mkdir -p bundles/dynbinary-daemon/
cp $WORK/b001/exe/a.out bundles/dynbinary-daemon/docker-proxy
rm -rf $WORK/b001/
Created binary: bundles/dynbinary-daemon/docker-proxy

make -j2 
mkdir man8
/usr/bin/go-md2man -in dockerd.8.md -out man8/dockerd.8

  [ ok ]
  [ ok ]
 * 
 * To use Docker, the Docker daemon must be running as root. To automatically
 * start the Docker daemon at boot:
 *   rc-update add docker default
 * 
 * To use Docker as a non-root user, add yourself to the 'docker' group:
 *   usermod -aG docker <youruser>
 * 
 * Install additional packages for optional runtime features:
 *   sys-apps/rootlesskit for rootless mode support
 * for rootless mode you also need a network stack
 *   app-containers/slirp4netns for rootless mode network stack
